name: Kentucky Department of Corrections — Division of Reentry Services
description: The Kentucky Department of Corrections Division of Reentry Services coordinates statewide reentry planning for people in state custody or under community supervision. The division oversees 13 Reentry Service Centers across Kentucky and assigns regional reentry coordinators who work with individuals and families before and after release. They help build individualized reentry plans and connect people to housing, employment, benefits, and community partners. This is a planning and referral office—not a crisis or emergency line.
description_es: La División de Servicios de Reinserción del Departamento de Correcciones de Kentucky coordina la planificación estatal para personas en custodia estatal o bajo supervisión comunitaria. Supervisa 13 Centros de Servicios de Reinserción en todo el estado y asigna coordinadores regionales que trabajan con personas y familias antes y después de la liberación. Ayudan a crear planes personalizados y conectar con vivienda, empleo, beneficios y aliados comunitarios. Es una oficina de planificación y referencias—no una línea de crisis.
eligibility: Varies by program—generally serves Kentucky residents under DOC custody, supervision, or seeking state reentry services.
eligibility_es: Varía según el programa—generalmente sirve a residentes de Kentucky bajo custodia DOC, supervisión o que buscan servicios estatales de reintegración.
notes: For your area, contact the regional Reentry Coordinator listed at corrections.ky.gov/Reentry.
notes_es: Personas bajo custodia o supervisión del DOC de Kentucky y sus familias. Para preguntas generales, llame al (502) 782-2347. Para su región, contacte al coordinador de reinserción en corrections.ky.gov/Reentry.
hours: Monday–Friday, 8:00 a.m.–4:30 p.m.
services: Individualized reentry planning|Regional reentry coordinator referrals|Reentry Service Center oversight|Community partnership navigation|Pre-release programming coordination

name: Kentucky DOC — Second Chance Portal
description: Free statewide online hub from Kentucky DOC for people preparing for release or already in reentry. Curated links cover housing, jobs, education, public benefits (SNAP, Medicaid, K-TAP), substance use recovery, expungement, and local reentry councils. No account required—browse anytime from a phone or computer. Phone support depends on the specific program linked from the portal.
description_es: Portal en línea gratuito del DOC de Kentucky para quienes se preparan para la liberación o ya están en reinserción. Enlaces organizados sobre vivienda, empleo, educación, beneficios públicos (SNAP, Medicaid, K-TAP), recuperación, eliminación de antecedentes y consejos locales. No requiere cuenta—disponible en teléfono u ordenador. El soporte telefónico depende de cada programa enlazado.
eligibility: Varies by program—generally serves Kentucky residents under DOC custody, supervision, or seeking state reentry services.
eligibility_es: Varía según el programa—generalmente sirve a residentes de Kentucky bajo custodia DOC, supervisión o que buscan servicios estatales de reintegración.
notes_es: Centro en línea gratuito para personas en reinserción en Kentucky, con enlaces a vivienda, empleo, educación, beneficios, recuperación y eliminación de antecedentes.
hours: Available online anytime; live referral lines vary by program
services: Online resource navigation|Employment and benefits links|Recovery resource referrals|Expungement information

name: KY HELP Statewide Substance Use Hotline
description: Free statewide phone line (1-833-KY-HELP7) operated by Operation UNITE for Kentuckians concerned about substance use—for themselves or a loved one. Trained specialists provide confidential screening, treatment referrals (inpatient, outpatient, and medication-assisted options), peer support connections, and links to FindHelpNow.org providers across Kentucky. Open evenings and weekends; after hours, call the KY Opioid Assistance and Resource (KY-OAR) Hotline at 800-854-6813.
description_es: Línea telefónica gratuita estatal (1-833-KY-HELP7) operada por Operation UNITE para quienes buscan ayuda con el uso de sustancias—para sí mismos o un ser querido. Especialistas capacitados ofrecen evaluación confidencial, referencias a tratamiento (interno, ambulatorio y asistido con medicamentos), conexión con apoyo entre pares y proveedores en FindHelpNow.org. Abierta noches y fines de semana; fuera de horario, llame a KY-OAR al 800-854-6813.
eligibility: Varies by program—generally serves Kentucky residents under DOC custody, supervision, or seeking state reentry services.
eligibility_es: Varía según el programa—generalmente sirve a residentes de Kentucky bajo custodia DOC, supervisión o que buscan servicios estatales de reintegración.
notes: 1-833-KY-HELP7
notes_es: Detección y referencia gratuita para uso de sustancias en todo el estado. Fuera de horario, llame a la línea KY-OAR al 800-854-6813.
hours: Monday–Friday, 7:00 a.m.–10:00 p.m. ET; Saturday–Sunday, 8:30 a.m.–5:30 p.m. ET
services: Substance use screening|Treatment referrals|Family support|FindHelpNow provider connections

name: Southern Kentucky Reentry Council
description: Regional reentry coalition serving 10 south-central Kentucky counties: Logan, Simpson, Butler, Warren, Edmonson, Hart, Barren, Allen, Metcalfe, and Monroe. Volunteers and partner agencies meet regularly to share resources and referrals—this is a networking council, not a direct-service provider. Can help connect justice-involved individuals with ID documents, transportation, housing leads, employment, and scholarship opportunities. Contact for meeting dates and partner introductions.
description_es: Coalición regional de reinserción que atiende 10 condados del centro-sur de Kentucky: Logan, Simpson, Butler, Warren, Edmonson, Hart, Barren, Allen, Metcalfe y Monroe. Voluntarios y aliados se reúnen para compartir recursos—es un consejo de red, no un proveedor de servicios directos. Puede conectar a personas con identificación, transporte, opciones de vivienda, empleo y becas. Contacte para fechas de reuniones y referencias a socios.
eligibility: Varies by program—generally serves Kentucky residents under DOC custody, supervision, or seeking state reentry services.
eligibility_es: Varía según el programa—generalmente sirve a residentes de Kentucky bajo custodia DOC, supervisión o que buscan servicios estatales de reintegración.
notes: Networking council serving 10 southern Kentucky counties. Does not provide direct services
notes_es: Consejo de red en 10 condados del sur de Kentucky. No presta servicios directos conecta a las personas con organizaciones comunitarias para identificación, transporte, vivienda y otras necesidades.
hours: Contact by phone or email; see website for public partnership meeting dates
services: Resource navigation|Community partner referrals|Scholarship information|Reentry coalition meetings

name: FIVCO Reentry Council
description: Regional reentry council for northeastern Kentucky's FIVCO five-county area: Boyd, Carter, Elliott, Greenup, and Lawrence. Part of the statewide Kentucky Reentry Council network, FIVCO coordinates information among courts, corrections, faith-based groups, employers, and social service agencies. Does not operate housing or treatment programs—use this contact for local partner referrals and coalition meeting information.
description_es: Consejo regional de reinserción para el área FIVCO de cinco condados en el noreste de Kentucky: Boyd, Carter, Elliott, Greenup y Lawrence. Parte de la red estatal Kentucky Reentry Council; coordina información entre tribunales, correcciones, grupos de fe, empleadores y agencias de servicios sociales. No opera programas de vivienda ni tratamiento—use este contacto para referencias locales y reuniones del consejo.
eligibility: Varies by program—generally serves Kentucky residents under DOC custody, supervision, or seeking state reentry services.

notes: Regional networking council for Boyd, Carter, Elliott, Greenup, and Lawrence counties. Coordinates partners and information sharing does not operate direct reentry programs. Contact for meeting schedule.

hours: Contact for meeting times
services: Regional partner networking|Reentry information sharing|Community coordination

name: CTS-Russell (Community Transitional Services)
description: Kentucky DOC-contracted Reentry Service Center for men in community custody, operated by Community Transitional Services (CTS). Provides licensed transitional housing plus structured programming: Moral Reconation Therapy (MRT), employment preparation, substance use education, and case management aligned with parole and probation requirements. Admissions require a referral from Kentucky DOC Probation and Parole—call to confirm current bed availability.
description_es: Centro de Servicios de Reinserción contratado por el DOC de Kentucky para hombres bajo custodia comunitaria, operado por Community Transitional Services (CTS). Ofrece vivienda transitoria con licencia y programación estructurada: Terapia de Reconación Moral (MRT), preparación laboral, educación sobre sustancias y manejo de casos alineado con libertad condicional. Las admisiones requieren referido de Probation and Parole del DOC—llame para confirmar disponibilidad.
eligibility: Provides licensed transitional housing plus structured programming: Moral Reconation Therapy (MRT), employment preparation, substance use education, and case management aligned with parole and probation requirements. Admissions require a referral from Kentucky DOC Probation and Parole—call to confirm current bed availability.

notes: Male DOC-contracted Reentry Service Center offering transitional housing, employment preparation, MRT, and reentry programming.
notes_es: Centro de Reinserción contratado por el DOC para hombres con vivienda transitoria, preparación laboral, MRT y programación de reinserción.
hours: Visitation Saturday–Sunday, 12:00–3:00 p.m.; call for office hours
services: Transitional housing|Employment preparation|MRT classes|Substance abuse programming|Community referrals

name: The Burns M. Brady Center
description: Kentucky DOC-contracted Reentry Service Center in downtown Louisville, operated by The Healing Place. Serves men and women under community supervision with transitional housing integrated into long-term addiction recovery tracks. Combines sober living structure, peer-led recovery, clinical support, and employment readiness in one program. Access is through Kentucky DOC referral—call for admissions timeline and visiting hours.
description_es: Centro de Servicios de Reinserción contratado por el DOC en el centro de Louisville, operado por The Healing Place. Atiende hombres y mujeres bajo supervisión comunitaria con vivienda transitoria integrada en programas de recuperación a largo plazo. Combina estructura de vida sobria, recuperación entre pares, apoyo clínico y preparación laboral. El acceso es por referido del DOC de Kentucky—llame para admisiones y horarios de visita.
eligibility: Varies by program—many accept individuals with felony records. Most transitional and reentry housing requires referral or application; call to confirm bed availability and criteria.
eligibility_es: Varía según el programa—muchos aceptan personas con antecedentes penales. La mayoría de vivienda transitoria requiere referido o solicitud; llame para confirmar disponibilidad.
notes: DOC-contracted Reentry Service Center operated by The Healing Place. Transitional housing and addiction recovery programming referrals through Kentucky DOC.
notes_es: Centro de Reinserción contratado por el DOC operado por The Healing Place. Vivienda transitoria y programación de recuperación referidos a través del DOC de Kentucky.
hours: Call for admissions and visiting hours (DOC referral required)
services: Transitional housing|Addiction recovery programming|Reentry support|DOC supervision coordination

name: Dismas Charities — Diersen (Louisville)
description: Federal and state residential reentry center (halfway house) in Louisville for men and women returning from prison. Dismas Charities provides structured sober living, case management, substance abuse programming, job readiness training, and support reuniting with family. Length of stay varies by referral source (Bureau of Prisons, Kentucky DOC, or courts). Intake typically requires an institutional referral—call to confirm bed availability and eligibility.
description_es: Centro residencial de reinserción (media casa) federal y estatal en Louisville para hombres y mujeres que salen de prisión. Dismas Charities ofrece vida sobria estructurada, manejo de casos, programación de sustancias, preparación laboral y apoyo para reunificación familiar. La duración varía según la fuente del referido (Buró de Prisiones, DOC de Kentucky o tribunales). Generalmente se requiere referido institucional—llame para confirmar disponibilidad y elegibilidad.
eligibility: Intake typically requires an institutional referral—call to confirm bed availability and eligibility.

services: Residential reentry housing|Employment assistance|Substance abuse treatment|Job training|Family reunification support

name: Dismas Charities — Portland (Louisville)
description: Dismas Charities halfway house in Louisville's Portland neighborhood for individuals released from incarceration. Offers gender-specific residential beds, daily structure and accountability, individualized reentry planning, employment assistance, and substance use programming in a faith-informed environment. Referrals usually come from the federal Bureau of Prisons, Kentucky DOC, or local courts—contact directly to inquire about openings and intake requirements.
description_es: Media casa de Dismas Charities en el barrio Portland de Louisville para personas liberadas del encarcelamiento. Ofrece camas residenciales, estructura diaria, planificación individual de reinserción, apoyo laboral y programación de sustancias en un ambiente con enfoque de fe. Los referidos suelen venir del Buró de Prisiones federal, el DOC de Kentucky o tribunales locales—contacte directamente para consultar disponibilidad y requisitos de ingreso.
eligibility: Varies by program—many accept individuals with felony records. Most transitional and reentry housing requires referral or application; call to confirm bed availability and criteria.

name: Volunteers of America — Halfway Back Program
description: Volunteers of America Mid-States operates Liberty Place (formerly the Halfway Back Program), a long-term residential treatment program for adult men on parole with substance use disorders. The six- to eight-month program includes housing, 12-step recovery, individual and group counseling, GED preparation, job training, and life skills development. Referrals often come from Kentucky DOC or court order. Located at the Shelby Campus in Louisville.
description_es: Volunteers of America Mid-States opera Liberty Place (antes el programa Halfway Back), un tratamiento residencial a largo plazo para hombres adultos en libertad condicional con trastornos por uso de sustancias. El programa de seis a ocho meses incluye vivienda, recuperación en 12 pasos, consejería individual y grupal, preparación para el GED, capacitación laboral y habilidades para la vida. Los referidos suelen venir del DOC de Kentucky o una orden judicial. Ubicado en el Campus Shelby de Louisville.
eligibility: Varies by program—many accept individuals with felony records. Most transitional and reentry housing requires referral or application; call to confirm bed availability and criteria.

name: Volunteers of America — Freedom House
description: Volunteers of America Mid-States Freedom House is a long-term residential treatment program for pregnant women and mothers with substance use disorders. All children under 18 may live with their mother during treatment—there is no limit on the number of children. The family-centered program includes medication-assisted treatment, individual and group therapy, parenting and reunification support, CPS-qualified parenting classes, life skills, and vocational training. Same-day intake is available evenings and weekends. Two Louisville locations (Shelby Street and Second Street).
description_es: Freedom House de Volunteers of America Mid-States es un tratamiento residencial a largo plazo para mujeres embarazadas y madres con trastornos por uso de sustancias. Todos los hijos menores de 18 años pueden vivir con su madre durante el tratamiento—sin límite de cantidad. El programa centrado en la familia incluye tratamiento asistido con medicamentos, terapia individual y grupal, apoyo para la reunificación familiar, clases de crianza, habilidades para la vida y capacitación vocacional. Admisiones el mismo día, noches y fines de semana. Dos ubicaciones en Louisville (Shelby Street y Second Street).
eligibility: Varies by program—many accept individuals with felony records. Most transitional and reentry housing requires referral or application; call to confirm bed availability and criteria.

notes: Intake available same day, evenings, and weekends. Also serves 1025 South Second Street, Louisville.

hours: Intake: call (502) 635-4530 anytime for admissions scheduling

name: Re:Center Ministries
description: Re:Center Ministries is a faith-based organization serving Louisville's homeless and hurting since 1881. Offers emergency overnight shelter for men (reserve through Coordinated Shelter Access at 502-637-2337), a day shelter for women and children, and the LifeChange long-term recovery program for men completing a 90-day track with access to private suites. Also helps individuals obtain ID documents and a mailing address. Relocated to South Brook Street with expanded shelter capacity.
description_es: Re:Center Ministries es una organización con enfoque de fe que sirve a personas sin hogar y en crisis en Louisville desde 1881. Ofrece refugio nocturno de emergencia para hombres (reservar por Coordinated Shelter Access al 502-637-2337), refugio diurno para mujeres y niños, y el programa LifeChange de recuperación a largo plazo para hombres. También ayuda a obtener identificación y dirección postal. Reubicado en South Brook Street con mayor capacidad.
eligibility: Varies by program—many accept individuals with felony records. Most transitional and reentry housing requires referral or application; call to confirm bed availability and criteria.
eligibility_es: Varía según el programa—muchos aceptan personas con antecedentes penales. La mayoría de vivienda transitoria requiere referido o solicitud; llame para confirmar disponibilidad.
notes_es: Camas del refugio nocturno para hombres se reservan por Coordinated Shelter Access: (502) 637-2337, diario 10 a.m.–1 p.m. El programa LifeChange requiere admisión al programa.
hours: Shelter check-in for men: 7:00–7:30 p.m.; check-out 6:30 a.m. Call for LifeChange and day shelter hours
services: Emergency men's shelter|Women and children's day shelter|LifeChange addiction recovery|ID and mailing address assistance|Church partnerships

name: Exodus Scholar Homes
description: Exodus Scholar Homes provides small-scale transitional and recovery housing in Louisville's West End for individuals seeking stability after incarceration or during recovery. The program operates a duplex with four beds and offers case management, job training connections, and mental health counseling support. Office hours are weekdays; call ahead to confirm bed availability and intake requirements.
description_es: Exodus Scholar Homes ofrece vivienda transitoria y de recuperación a pequeña escala en el West End de Louisville para personas que buscan estabilidad después del encarcelamiento o durante la recuperación. Opera un dúplex con cuatro camas y ofrece manejo de casos, conexiones de capacitación laboral y apoyo de consejería en salud mental. Horario de oficina entre semana; llame con anticipación para confirmar disponibilidad.
eligibility: Varies by program—many accept individuals with felony records. Most transitional and reentry housing requires referral or application; call to confirm bed availability and criteria.
eligibility_es: Varía según el programa—muchos aceptan personas con antecedentes penales. La mayoría de vivienda transitoria requiere referido o solicitud; llame para confirmar disponibilidad.
notes: Small transitional duplex (4 beds). Mental health counseling provider. Call to confirm current intake process and availability.

hours: Monday–Friday, 9:00 a.m.–7:00 p.m.
services: Transitional housing|Recovery housing|Case management|Job training referrals|Mental health counseling

name: Coalition for the Homeless — Single Point of Entry
description: Coordinated Shelter Access (formerly Single Point of Entry) is Louisville Metro's central phone and walk-in line for reserving emergency shelter beds and connecting to homelessness prevention services. Operated by the Coalition for the Homeless, CSA helps adults—including those recently released from jail or prison—find overnight shelter placement and referrals to housing navigation, benefits, and other social services. Also dial 2-1-1 for 24/7 assistance.
description_es: Coordinated Shelter Access (antes Single Point of Entry) es la línea central telefónica y presencial de Louisville Metro para reservar camas en refugios de emergencia y conectar con servicios de prevención de la falta de vivienda. Operado por Coalition for the Homeless; ayuda a adultos—including recién liberados—con colocación en refugios y referencias a vivienda, beneficios y otros servicios. También marque 2-1-1 para ayuda 24/7.
eligibility: Varies by program—many accept individuals with felony records. Most transitional and reentry housing requires referral or application; call to confirm bed availability and criteria.
eligibility_es: Varía según el programa—muchos aceptan personas con antecedentes penales. La mayoría de vivienda transitoria requiere referido o solicitud; llame para confirmar disponibilidad.
notes: Phone reservations daily 10 a.m.–1 p.m. Walk-in at 1300 S. 4th St. #250, Monday–Friday 10 a.m.–1 p.m. Closed on major holidays—call shelters directly on those days.
notes_es: Reservas telefónicas diarias 10 a.m.–1 p.m. Presencial en 1300 S. 4th St. #250, lunes a viernes 10 a.m.–1 p.m. Cerrado en días festivos principales—llame directamente a los refugios esos días.
hours: Phone: daily 10:00 a.m.–1:00 p.m.; walk-in: Monday–Friday 10:00 a.m.–1:00 p.m.
services: Emergency shelter bed reservations|Homelessness prevention referrals|Housing navigation connections|Social service referrals

name: Chrysalis House
description: Chrysalis House is Kentucky's oldest and largest licensed residential substance use treatment program for women and a Kentucky DOC-contracted Reentry Service Center. Serves women age 18+ from across Kentucky; pregnant women and mothers may bring newborns and children under two full-time, with older children visiting on weekends. Offers residential and outpatient treatment, GED support, employment assistance, domestic violence counseling, and on-site early childhood education. Call admissions for a confidential screening.
description_es: Chrysalis House es el programa de tratamiento residencial para mujeres más antiguo y grande de Kentucky con licencia estatal y un Centro de Servicios de Reinserción contratado por el DOC. Atiende mujeres de 18+ en todo Kentucky; mujeres embarazadas y madres pueden traer recién nacidos e hijos menores de dos años a tiempo completo. Ofrece tratamiento residencial y ambulatorio, apoyo para el GED, empleo, consejería sobre violencia doméstica y educación infantil en el sitio. Llame a admisiones para una evaluación confidencial.
eligibility: Varies by program—many accept individuals with felony records. Most transitional and reentry housing requires referral or application; call to confirm bed availability and criteria.
eligibility_es: Varía según el programa—muchos aceptan personas con antecedentes penales. La mayoría de vivienda transitoria requiere referido o solicitud; llame para confirmar disponibilidad.
notes: DOC-contracted RSC. Admissions screening: (859) 977-2501. Women with children welcome.

name: Hope Center — George Privett (Men)
description: The Hope Center's George Privett Recovery Center is a Kentucky DOC-contracted Reentry Service Center providing long-term residential recovery for men with substance use disorders. The 9–12 month peer-driven program uses the Recovery Dynamics curriculum with 12-step principles, accountability, life skills, and employment readiness. Many men enter through Safe Off the Streets (SOS) emergency shelter before transitioning into structured recovery. DOC Probation and Parole referrals accepted.
description_es: El George Privett Recovery Center del Hope Center es un Centro de Servicios de Reinserción contratado por el DOC que ofrece recuperación residencial a largo plazo para hombres con trastornos por uso de sustancias. El programa de 9–12 meses entre pares usa el plan de estudios Recovery Dynamics con principios de 12 pasos, responsabilidad, habilidades para la vida y preparación laboral. Muchos ingresan por el refugio Safe Off the Streets (SOS). Acepta referidos de Probation and Parole del DOC.
eligibility: DOC Probation and Parole referrals accepted.

notes: Kentucky DOC-contracted RSC for men. Program typically 9–12 months. Entry point: Safe Off the Streets (SOS) shelter also on Loudon Avenue campus.
notes_es: RSC contratado por el DOC para hombres. Programa típicamente de 9–12 meses. Punto de entrada: refugio Safe Off the Streets (SOS) en el campus de Loudon Avenue.

name: Hope Center — Ball-Quantrell Jones (Women)
description: The Hope Center's Ball-Quantrell Jones Recovery Center for Women is a Kentucky DOC-contracted Reentry Service Center offering long-term residential recovery for women with substance use disorders. Since 2002, this gender-specific program combines trauma-informed care, the Recovery Dynamics curriculum, peer support, and professional supervision with employment readiness and health clinic access. Open to women across Kentucky seeking a safe structured environment for sustained sobriety.

Desde 2002, este programa específico para mujeres combina atención informada sobre trauma, el plan Recovery Dynamics, apoyo entre pares y supervisión profesional con preparación laboral y acceso a clínica de salud.

name: Dismas Charities — Lexington
description: Dismas Charities Lexington is a Kentucky DOC-listed residential reentry center (halfway house) at 909 Georgetown Street for men and women returning from state and federal incarceration in Central Kentucky. Provides structured community-based supervision, employment assistance, substance abuse programming, and support reconnecting with family and employers. Referrals typically come from Kentucky DOC, the Bureau of Prisons, or courts—call to confirm bed availability.
description_es: Dismas Charities Lexington es un centro residencial de reinserción (media casa) en 909 Georgetown Street para hombres y mujeres que regresan del encarcelamiento estatal y federal en el centro de Kentucky. Ofrece supervisión comunitaria estructurada, apoyo laboral, programación de sustancias y apoyo para reconectar con familia y empleadores. Los referidos suelen venir del DOC de Kentucky, el Buró de Prisiones o tribunales—llame para confirmar disponibilidad.

The structured 12-month residential program emphasizes 12-step fellowship, peer accountability, individual therapy, employment, and daily life skills. Suitable for men on probation, parole, or court compliance who commit to sustained sobriety. Also operates DOC-affiliated programs in multiple Kentucky counties. description: Goodwill Industries of Kentucky's RISE program (Reintegrating Individuals Successfully Every Day) provides free virtual two-week job-readiness training for justice-involved Kentuckians. Covers soft skills, financial literacy, digital literacy, communication, resume writing, mock interviews, and behavioral health topics. Graduates earn a Work Ready Certificate and may receive a Chromebook, stipend, and gym membership. Offered in Louisville, Lexington, Bowling Green, Pikeville, and other Opportunity Center locations serving 103 counties.

Los graduados reciben certificado Work Ready y pueden obtener Chromebook, estipendio y membresía de gimnasio. Disponible en Louisville, Lexington, Bowling Green, Pikeville y más.

Clinics held throughout the year in cities including Louisville, Lexington, Corbin, and more—registration opens before each event. Does not cover counties outside Goodwill's service area (refer to Kentucky Legal Aid for those).

description_es: El Kentucky Career Center del norte de Kentucky conecta buscadores de empleo y empleadores en Boone, Kenton, Campbell y condados circundantes a través de más de 20 organizaciones aliadas. Orientación profesional gratuita, talleres, servicios de currículum, financiamiento WIOA y apoyo especializado para veteranos, personas con discapacidades y personas en recuperación. Eventos semanales de orientación.
eligibility: Open to all job seekers, including those recently released from incarceration. Core career services are free.
eligibility_es: Abierto a todos los buscadores de empleo, incluidos recién liberados. Los servicios básicos de carrera son gratuitos.
notes: Partners include Gateway Community College, Goodwill, and TANK transit. Tuesday orientation 10–11 a.m. For unemployment claims, visit kcc.ky.gov or call 502-564-2900.

description: The Kentucky Career Center in Bowling Green serves Warren County and the surrounding area with free American Job Center services: job search assistance, resume help, employment workshops, career counseling, and referrals to training programs. Part of the statewide workforce development network. Open to all job seekers including those with justice-involved backgrounds rebuilding employment history.

Parte de la red estatal de desarrollo laboral. Abierto a todos, incluidos quienes reconstruyen su historial laboral tras el sistema de justicia.
eligibility: Open to all job seekers including those with justice-involved backgrounds rebuilding employment history.

notes: Warren County American Job Center. Part of Southcentral Kentucky workforce development network.

Free American Job Center services include career counseling, job preparation, portfolio building, WIOA training accounts, apprenticeships, and employer connections. Four center locations: Ashland, Maysville, Mt. Sterling, and Morehead.

Sterling y Morehead.

name: Eastern Kentucky CEP (EKCEP) — SITE Program
description: EKCEP (Eastern Kentucky Concentrated Employment Program) administers the SITE program (Strategic Initiative for Transformational Employment) across 23 Appalachian counties, bridging addiction recovery and workforce participation. Recovery-informed employment specialists provide hands-on training, work experience, barrier relief (transportation, gear, certifications), and career advising for people in reentry or recovery. Headquartered in Hazard with Kentucky Career Center JobSight locations across the region.
description_es: EKCEP administra el programa SITE (Iniciativa Estratégica para el Empleo Transformacional) en 23 condados apalaches, conectando recuperación de adicciones y participación laboral. Especialistas en empleo informados sobre recuperación ofrecen capacitación práctica, experiencia laboral, alivio de barreras (transporte, equipo, certificaciones) y asesoramiento profesional para personas en reinserción o recuperación. Sede en Hazard.
eligibility: Open to all job seekers, including those recently released from incarceration. Core career services are free.
eligibility_es: Abierto a todos los buscadores de empleo, incluidos recién liberados. Los servicios básicos de carrera son gratuitos.
notes: Also operates Project REACH in 8 counties. SITE funded in part by KORE/SAMHSA and Kentucky Office of Drug Control Policy.
notes_es: También opera Project REACH en 8 condados. SITE financiado parcialmente por KORE/SAMHSA. Llame para la ubicación JobSight más cercana en su condado.
hours: Monday–Friday, 8:00 a.m.–4:30 p.m.
services: Recovery-informed job training|Work experience placements|Barrier relief assistance|Career advising|Certification support|Project REACH employment services

name: Kentucky Dept of Professional Licensing — Occupational Licensing
description: Kentucky's Department of Professional Licensing (DPL) oversees 25 occupational licensing boards. Under HB 185 (2026), individuals with criminal records can petition a licensing board for a predetermination on whether their conviction would disqualify them from a specific license—before investing in training or fees. Boards may only deny when a conviction directly relates to the occupation and must provide written findings. Contact DPL to be routed to the correct board.
description_es: El Departamento de Licencias Profesionales de Kentucky (DPL) supervisa 25 juntas de licencias ocupacionales. Bajo HB 185 (2026), personas con antecedentes penales pueden solicitar a una junta una predeterminación sobre si su condena los descalificaría de una licencia específica—antes de invertir en capacitación o tarifas. Las juntas solo pueden negar cuando la condena se relacione directamente con la ocupación. Contacte al DPL para ser dirigido a la junta correcta.
eligibility: Open to all job seekers, including those recently released from incarceration. Core career services are free.
eligibility_es: Abierto a todos los buscadores de empleo, incluidos recién liberados. Los servicios básicos de carrera son gratuitos.
notes: HB 185 predetermination process: boards must establish procedures by January 1, 2027. Boards consider rehabilitation evidence, time since offense, and relationship to licensed duties.
notes_es: Proceso de predeterminación HB 185: las juntas deben establecer procedimientos antes del 1 de enero de 2027. Consideran evidencia de rehabilitación, tiempo desde la ofensa y relación con las funciones licenciadas. No es asistencia legal—contacte Legal Aid o Goodwill para eliminación de antecedentes.
hours: Monday–Friday, 8:00 a.m.–4:30 p.m.
services: Licensing board referrals|HB 185 predetermination information|Occupational license guidance|Board contact routing

name: Institute for Justice — Kentucky Licensing
description: The Institute for Justice (IJ) is a national nonprofit public-interest law firm that advocated for Kentucky's occupational licensing reforms including HB 185. IJ does not operate a Kentucky office or provide direct legal representation to most individuals—but may take select cases where government licensing rules violate economic liberty rights. If a licensing board denied your application due to a criminal record, submit your situation through IJ's online case form. For predetermination requests under HB 185, contact Kentucky DPL first.
description_es: El Institute for Justice (IJ) es una firma nacional de interés público que defendió las reformas de licencias ocupacionales de Kentucky, incluida HB 185. IJ no tiene oficina en Kentucky ni representa directamente a la mayoría de las personas—pero puede tomar casos selectos donde las reglas de licencia violen derechos de libertad económica. Si una junta negó su solicitud por antecedentes penales, envíe su situación por el formulario en línea de IJ. Para predeterminación bajo HB 185, contacte primero al DPL de Kentucky.
eligibility: Open to all job seekers, including those recently released from incarceration. Core career services are free.
eligibility_es: Abierto a todos los buscadores de empleo, incluidos recién liberados. Los servicios básicos de carrera son gratuitos.
notes: Submit licensing denial cases at ij.org/report-abuse (no phone calls). IJ only litigates against government entities.
notes_es: Envíe casos de negación de licencia en ij.org/report-abuse (sin llamadas). IJ solo litiga contra entidades gubernamentales. Para predeterminación HB 185, use DPL de Kentucky al (502) 564-3296.
hours: Online case submission only; no walk-in Kentucky office
services: Occupational licensing reform advocacy|Select litigation against government licensing barriers|Online case intake for economic liberty violations|Kentucky HB 185 policy resources

name: kynect — Medicaid & Benefits Enrollment
description: kynect is Kentucky's official online portal to apply for Medicaid (including the Kentucky HEALTH plan), SNAP food benefits, KTAP cash assistance, childcare subsidies, and other public benefits. People leaving incarceration can enroll in Medicaid immediately upon release—and under Kentucky's federal 1115 Reentry waiver, eligible individuals may receive up to one year of Medicaid coverage plus pre-release screening starting 60 days before release. Apply online, call the helpline, or visit any DCBS office.
description_es: kynect es el portal oficial de Kentucky para solicitar Medicaid (incluido Kentucky HEALTH), beneficios SNAP, asistencia KTAP, subsidios de cuidado infantil y otros beneficios públicos. Las personas que salen del encarcelamiento pueden inscribirse en Medicaid inmediatamente—y bajo la exención federal 1115 de Reinserción, personas elegibles pueden recibir hasta un año de cobertura Medicaid más evaluación previa a la liberación desde 60 días antes. Solicite en línea, por teléfono o en cualquier oficina del DCBS.
eligibility: Open to Kentucky residents in the service area. Medicaid, Medicare, and most insurance accepted; crisis services available regardless of ability to pay.
eligibility_es: Abierto a residentes de Kentucky en el área de servicio. Se acepta Medicaid, Medicare y la mayoría de seguros; servicios de crisis disponibles sin importar capacidad de pago.
notes: Medicaid reentry waiver: pre-release screening up to 60 days before release For local DCBS office, visit kynect.ky.gov or call 1-855-306-8959.
notes_es: Exención Medicaid de reinserción: evaluación previa hasta 60 días antes de la liberación suministro de un mes de medicamentos al salir para elegibles. Para oficina DCBS local, visite kynect.ky.gov o llame al 1-855-306-8959.
hours: Online 24/7; phone support Monday–Friday during business hours
services: Medicaid enrollment|SNAP and KTAP applications|Childcare assistance|Pre-release Medicaid screening|Reentry health coverage navigation|DCBS office referrals

name: Seven Counties Services — Louisville
description: Seven Counties Services is the Community Mental Health Center (CMHC) for Jefferson, Bullitt, Henry, Oldham, Shelby, Spencer, and Trimble counties. Provides a full continuum: outpatient mental health and substance use treatment, detox, residential crisis stabilization, mobile crisis response, developmental disability services, and recovery housing. Explicitly serves justice-involved individuals including those on probation, parole, or recently released. 24/7 crisis line and 988 local team.
description_es: Seven Counties Services es el Centro Comunitario de Salud Mental (CMHC) para los condados Jefferson, Bullitt, Henry, Oldham, Shelby, Spencer y Trimble. Ofrece un continuo completo: salud mental ambulatoria, tratamiento de sustancias, desintoxicación, estabilización de crisis residencial, respuesta móvil de crisis, discapacidades del desarrollo y vivienda de recuperación. Sirve explícitamente a personas en el sistema de justicia. Línea de crisis 24/7 y equipo local 988.
eligibility: Explicitly serves justice-involved individuals including those on probation, parole, or recently released.

notes_es: Crisis 24/7: (502) 589-4313 o llame/textee 988. Crisis móvil disponible bajo solicitud. Apoyo presencial en clínicas durante horario de oficina.
hours: Crisis line 24/7; clinic hours vary by location
services: Outpatient mental health and substance use treatment|Detox and residential crisis care|24/7 mobile crisis team|988 crisis counseling|Recovery housing|IDD services

name: Centerstone — Louisville
description: Centerstone Kentucky provides behavioral health services across the Louisville region including outpatient mental health care, substance use treatment, family and children's services, and crisis support. Multiple Louisville-area locations. 24/7 crisis line connects to trained counselors. Accepts Medicaid and most insurance. Open to adults and families including those navigating reentry, probation, or recovery.

Varias ubicaciones en el área de Louisville. Línea de crisis 24/7 conecta con consejeros capacitados. Acepta Medicaid y la mayoría de seguros.

name: New Vista Behavioral Health — Lexington
description: New Vista (formerly New Vista Behavioral Health) is the CMHC serving 17 Central Kentucky counties including Fayette, Madison, Jessamine, and Clark. Offers mental health, substance use, intellectual and developmental disability (IDD), and primary care services. Same-day Behavioral Health Urgent Care available for adults. 24/7 crisis line at 1-800-928-8000. Serves justice-involved individuals through outpatient and crisis services.

Ofrece salud mental, uso de sustancias, discapacidades intelectuales y del desarrollo (IDD) y atención primaria. Atención Urgente de Salud Conductual el mismo día para adultos. Línea de crisis 24/7 al 1-800-928-8000.

name: 988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline
description: Call or text 988 to reach the National Suicide & Crisis Lifeline—free, confidential support 24/7 for mental health crises, emotional distress, or substance use concerns. Spanish-speaking counselors available (press 2). Veterans can press 1 for the Veterans Crisis Line. Available anywhere in Kentucky; no insurance required. Can also chat at 988lifeline.org.
description_es: Llame o envíe un mensaje de texto al 988 para la Línea Nacional de Prevención del Suicidio y Crisis—apoyo gratuito y confidencial 24/7 para crisis de salud mental, angustia emocional o preocupaciones por sustancias. Consejeros en español disponibles (presione 2). Veteranos presionen 1 para la Línea de Crisis para Veteranos. Disponible en todo Kentucky; no requiere seguro.
eligibility: Open to Kentucky residents in the service area. Medicaid, Medicare, and most insurance accepted; crisis services available regardless of ability to pay.

notes: Call or text 988. Spanish: press 2. Veterans: press 1. Deaf/hard of hearing: use preferred relay service or dial 711 then 988.
notes_es: Llame o textee 988. Español: presione 2. No es una línea de emergencias físicas—para peligro inmediato, llame al 911.
hours: 24 hours a day, 7 days a week
services: 24/7 crisis counseling|Suicide prevention support|Substance use crisis support|Spanish-language counselors|Veterans Crisis Line connection|Online chat support

name: University of Louisville 550 HIV Clinic / Ryan White Program
description: The UofL 550 Clinic is the only Ryan White-funded HIV medical clinic in Louisville, serving HIV-positive individuals in a 7-county Greater Louisville region regardless of ability to pay. Provides primary HIV care, Rapid Start treatment, PrEP, on-site pharmacy and nutrition support, mental health and substance use linkage, and Ryan White case management including housing navigation. Telehealth connects to jails through the Kentucky TeleHealth Network.
description_es: La Clínica 550 de UofL es la única clínica de VIH financiada por Ryan White en Louisville, que atiende a personas VIH-positivas en una región de 7 condados sin importar capacidad de pago. Ofrece atención primaria de VIH, tratamiento Rapid Start, PrEP, farmacia y nutrición en el sitio, conexión con salud mental y sustancias, y manejo de casos Ryan White incluyendo navegación de vivienda. Telesalud conecta con cárceles.
eligibility: Open to Kentucky residents in the service area. Medicaid, Medicare, and most insurance accepted; crisis services available regardless of ability to pay.

notes: New patient intake: (502) 625-7195. Ryan White support services office: 501 E. Broadway, Suite 140A, (502) 852-2008.
notes_es: Ingreso de pacientes nuevos: (502) 625-7195. Servicios independientemente del seguro para clientes VIH+ elegibles.
hours: Monday–Friday, 8:00 a.m.–4:00 p.m.
services: HIV primary medical care|Rapid Start treatment|PrEP clinic|Ryan White case management|Housing navigation|On-site pharmacy|Jail telehealth connections

name: Volunteers of America — HIV Services (Louisville)
description: Volunteers of America Mid-States provides HOPWA (Housing Opportunities for Persons with AIDS) emergency financial assistance for housing and utilities for low-income individuals with documented HIV/AIDS in the Louisville area. HOPWA case managers help clients achieve long-term housing stability. Note: VOA's dedicated street outreach HIV testing program ended in 2025; for free HIV testing, contact Louisville Metro Public Health Specialty Clinic at (502) 574-6699.
description_es: Volunteers of America Mid-States ofrece asistencia financiera de emergencia HOPWA para vivienda y servicios públicos a personas de bajos ingresos con VIH/SIDA documentado en el área de Louisville. Los gestores HOPWA ayudan con estabilidad de vivienda a largo plazo. Nota: el programa de pruebas de VIH en la calle de VOA terminó en 2025; para pruebas gratuitas, contacte la Clínica Especializada de Louisville Metro al (502) 574-6699.
eligibility: Open to Kentucky residents in the service area. Medicaid, Medicare, and most insurance accepted; crisis services available regardless of ability to pay.
eligibility_es: Abierto a residentes de Kentucky en el área de servicio. Se acepta Medicaid, Medicare y la mayoría de seguros; servicios de crisis disponibles sin importar capacidad de pago.
notes: HIV Testing: (502) 635-4506 | HOPWA Housing: (502) 635-4511
notes_es: Gestor HOPWA: (502) 635-4506. Programación de ingreso: (502) 635-4522. Debe estar al 80% o menos del ingreso medio del área con estatus VIH documentado.
hours: Monday–Friday; call to schedule intake
services: HOPWA emergency rent assistance|Utility payment assistance|HIV/AIDS housing stability support|Long-term housing resource navigation

name: AVOL Kentucky — Lexington
description: AVOL (AIDS Volunteers, Inc.) is Kentucky's statewide HIV/AIDS service organization headquartered in Lexington. Provides free confidential HIV and STI testing, care coordination for people living with HIV, HOPWA and other housing assistance, prevention education, outreach, and on-site PrEP medical services. Serves individuals across Kentucky including those recently released from incarceration. Toll-free line available statewide.
description_es: AVOL (AIDS Volunteers, Inc.) es la organización estatal de servicios de VIH/SIDA con sede en Lexington. Ofrece pruebas gratuitas y confidenciales de VIH e ITS, coordinación de atención, asistencia de vivienda HOPWA, educación de prevención, extensión comunitaria y servicios médicos de PrEP en el sitio. Sirve a personas en todo Kentucky incluidas recién liberadas.
eligibility: Open to Kentucky residents in the service area. Medicaid, Medicare, and most insurance accepted; crisis services available regardless of ability to pay.
eligibility_es: Abierto a residentes de Kentucky en el área de servicio. Se acepta Medicaid, Medicare y la mayoría de seguros; servicios de crisis disponibles sin importar capacidad de pago.
notes_es: Línea gratuita: (877) 225-9245. Pruebas gratuitas de VIH/ITS con cita o sin cita durante horario de clínica. Servicios PrEP disponibles en Lexington.
hours: Monday–Friday; call for testing appointment times
services: Free HIV and STI testing|PrEP medical services|Care coordination|HIV housing assistance|Prevention education and outreach|Statewide referrals

name: Louisville Metro Public Health — Free HIV Testing
description: Louisville Metro Department of Public Health and Wellness Specialty Clinic offers HIV, syphilis, hepatitis C, gonorrhea, and chlamydia testing at 914 East Broadway, Suite 102. Free preliminary HIV screen available; sliding scale fees for full STI panels. Appointments recommended—call to schedule. Also coordinates mobile harm reduction outreach with free HIV testing at community sites across Louisville.
description_es: La Clínica Especializada del Departamento de Salud Pública de Louisville Metro ofrece pruebas de VIH, sífilis, hepatitis C, gonorrea y clamidia en 914 East Broadway, Suite 102. Prueba preliminar gratuita de VIH disponible; tarifas escalonadas para paneles completos de ITS. Se recomienda cita—llame para programar. También coordina extensión móvil de reducción de daños con pruebas gratuitas de VIH.
eligibility: Open to Kentucky residents in the service area. Medicaid, Medicare, and most insurance accepted; crisis services available regardless of ability to pay.

name: The Healing Place — Men's Campus
description: The Healing Place Men's Campus in Louisville offers free, peer-driven addiction recovery since 1989—one of the nation's largest social-model programs. Open 24/7 for detox and recovery entry. Program includes non-medical detox (3–10 days), Off the Streets motivational track, intensive Phase I peer mentoring using the SOBER180 curriculum, and transitional living. No insurance, Medicaid, or fees accepted—only a desire to get sober and in-person pre-screening required.
description_es: El Campus de Hombres de The Healing Place en Louisville ofrece recuperación gratuita entre pares desde 1989—uno de los programas de modelo social más grandes del país. Abierto 24/7 para desintoxicación e ingreso. Incluye desintoxicación no médica (3–10 días), pista motivacional Off the Streets, Fase I intensiva con mentores y vida transitoria. Sin seguro, Medicaid ni tarifas—solo deseo de sobriedad y evaluación presencial.
eligibility: First-come, first-served must pre-screen in person at campus.
eligibility_es: Adultos que buscan tratamiento de sustancias. Se acepta Medicaid y seguro privado en muchas ubicaciones; llame para criterios de admisión.
notes: Also operates Campbellsville men's campus.
notes_es: Por orden de llegada debe evaluarse en persona en el campus. No se requiere referido del DOC para admisión voluntaria. También opera campus de hombres en Campbellsville.
hours: Open 24/7 for detox and intake pre-screening
services: Free non-medical detox|Off the Streets motivational program|Phase I peer recovery|SOBER180 curriculum|Transitional living|Continuing care and employment referrals

name: The Healing Place — Women's Campus
description: The Healing Place Women's Campus is a free, peer-driven residential recovery program and Kentucky DOC-contracted Reentry Service Center in Louisville. Serves women 18+ with non-medical detox, Off the Streets track, intensive Phase I recovery, outpatient services, sober housing, and overnight shelter options. No cost to clients—must complete in-person pre-screening at 1503 South 15th Street. Open 24/7.
description_es: El Campus de Mujeres de The Healing Place es un programa de recuperación residencial gratuito entre pares y Centro de Servicios de Reinserción contratado por el DOC en Louisville. Atiende mujeres de 18+ con desintoxicación no médica, pista Off the Streets, Fase I intensiva, servicios ambulatorios, vivienda sobria y refugio nocturno. Sin costo—debe completar evaluación presencial en 1503 South 15th Street. Abierto 24/7.
eligibility: No cost to clients—must complete in-person pre-screening at 1503 South 15th Street.
eligibility_es: Adultos que buscan tratamiento de sustancias. Se acepta Medicaid y seguro privado en muchas ubicaciones; llame para criterios de admisión.
notes: Kentucky DOC-contracted RSC for women. Same main line as men's campus: (502) 585-4848. First-come pre-screening no fees or insurance. Burns M. Brady Center RSC operated by Healing Place is a separate DOC program.
notes_es: RSC contratado por el DOC para mujeres. Misma línea principal que campus de hombres: (502) 585-4848. Evaluación presencial por orden de llegada sin tarifas ni seguro.
hours: Open 24/7 for detox and intake pre-screening
services: Free women's residential recovery|DOC-contracted RSC|Non-medical detox|Off the Streets program|Outpatient services|Sober housing|Overnight shelter

name: Stepworks Recovery Centers
description: Stepworks Recovery Centers operates six Kentucky locations offering medical detox, residential (ASAM 3.5/3.7), and outpatient substance use treatment. Facilities in Elizabethtown, Bowling Green, Nicholasville, London, and Paducah. Medical detox for opioids, alcohol, and benzodiazepines; accepts most insurance including Medicaid. name: ACLU of Kentucky — Voting Rights Restoration (ROVR)
description: The ACLU of Kentucky's ROVR (Restoration of Voting Rights) campaign helps Kentuckians with past felony convictions understand and exercise their voting rights. Under Governor Beshear's 2019 executive order, non-violent Kentucky state felony convictions are automatically restored upon completion of the full sentence including probation and parole. ACLU provides registration resources, eligibility guidance, and advocacy—violent offenses, federal convictions, and out-of-state felonies require a separate restoration application.
description_es: La campaña ROVR de ACLU de Kentucky ayuda a ciudadanos con condenas previas a entender y ejercer sus derechos de voto. Bajo la orden ejecutiva de 2019, condenas por delitos graves no violentos del estado de Kentucky se restauran automáticamente al completar la sentencia incluyendo libertad condicional. ACLU ofrece recursos de registro y orientación—delitos violentos, condenas federales y de otros estados requieren solicitud separada.
eligibility: Under Governor Beshear's 2019 executive order, non-violent Kentucky state felony convictions are automatically restored upon completion of the full sentence including probation and parole. eligibility_es: Residentes de Kentucky de bajos ingresos. Se requiere admisión para confirmar elegibilidad de ingresos y si su caso legal está cubierto.
notes: Does not restore firearm rights. Register to vote at vrsws.sos.ky.gov after eligibility confirmed.
notes_es: Restauración automática aplica solo a sentencias completadas por delitos graves no violentos del ESTADO de Kentucky. No restaura derechos de armas. Regístrese en vrsws.sos.ky.gov después de confirmar elegibilidad.

description: Kentucky's official Civil Rights Restoration program administers voting rights for people with felony convictions. Non-violent Kentucky state felony convictions are automatically restored when the full sentence is complete—including probation and parole. Those with violent felonies, treason, election bribery, human trafficking, or federal/out-of-state convictions must submit a free application to the Governor. Check eligibility online or contact DOC restoration staff.

Condenas no violentas del estado se restauran automáticamente al completar la sentencia—incluyendo libertad condicional. Quienes tienen delitos violentos, traición, soborno electoral, trata de personas o condenas federales/de otro estado deben enviar solicitud gratuita al Gobernador.

Sessions held at the Jefferson County Judicial Center. Successful completion may result in reduced charges or dismissal.

eligibility_es: Varía según el programa—muchos sirven hogares de bajos ingresos; algunas despensas están abiertas a todos. Puede aplicar verificación de ingresos.
notes: Also try regional locators: daretocare.org/get-help (Louisville area), godspantry.org/help (Central/Eastern KY), feedingamericaky.org/find-help (42 western/central counties). Dial 2-1-1 for live navigation help.
notes_es: También pruebe localizadores regionales: daretocare.org (Louisville), godspantry.org/help (centro/este), feedingamericaky.org (oeste/centro). Marque 2-1-1 para ayuda en vivo.
hours: Online locator 24/7; pantry hours vary by site
services: National food bank search by zip code|Links to regional Kentucky food banks|Pantry and meal program directory|Emergency food resource navigation

name: Kentucky Office of Vital Statistics — Birth Certificates
description: Kentucky Office of Vital Statistics issues certified copies of birth, death, marriage, divorce, and stillbirth records for events that occurred in Kentucky (birth records from 1911 forward). A certified birth certificate is required to obtain a Kentucky driver's license or state ID. Order in person at the Frankfort office, by mail, online through VitalChek, or via will-call pickup after an online order. Fee: $10 per certificate (non-refundable search fee). Walk-in customers may pay by cash, check/money order payable to Kentucky State Treasurer, or debit/credit (+$2.50 processing fee). Same-day service not guaranteed after 3:45 p.m.
description_es: La Oficina de Estadísticas Vitales de Kentucky emite copias certificadas de nacimiento, defunción, matrimonio, divorcio y mortinato ocurridos en Kentucky (nacimientos desde 1911). Se requiere certificado de nacimiento certificado para licencia de conducir o identificación estatal. Solicite en persona en Frankfort, por correo, en línea por VitalChek o recogida will-call. Tarifa: $10 por certificado (tarifa de búsqueda no reembolsable). Servicio el mismo día no garantizado después de las 3:45 p.m.
eligibility: Kentucky residents. Returning citizens with felony convictions may use a Felon Release Letter plus certified birth certificate for a standard ID—see program details.
eligibility_es: Residentes de Kentucky. Ciudadanos que regresan con condenas previas pueden usar Carta de Liberación más acta de nacimiento certificada para ID estándar.
notes: VitalChek phone: 1-877-817-7362
notes_es: VitalChek en línea/teléfono: 1-877-817-7362 o vitalchek.com. Envíe solicitudes por correo a OVS, 275 East Main Street, 1E-A, Frankfort, KY 40621.
hours: Monday–Friday, 8:00 a.m.–4:30 p.m. EST (walk-in lobby until 3:30 p.m.; same-day not guaranteed after 3:45 p.m.)
services: Certified birth certificates|Death marriage divorce records|Mail and online ordering|Will-call pickup|Record amendments

name: Kentucky Driver Licensing (DRIVE) — State ID
description: Kentucky Transportation Cabinet Driver Licensing (DRIVE) issues standard and REAL ID driver's licenses and personal identification cards at regional offices statewide. Returning citizens with felony convictions can use a Felon Release Letter from KDOC, Division of Probation and Parole, Federal Bureau of Prisons (Kentucky facility), or U.S. Probation Office—plus a certified U.S. birth certificate—as primary identity proof for a standard credential. Letter must be presented within 30 calendar days of its issue date. Use the IDocument Guide at drive.ky.gov to build a personalized document checklist before visiting.
description_es: Licencias de conducir e identificaciones del Gabinete de Transporte de Kentucky (DRIVE) se emiten en oficinas regionales. Ciudadanos que regresan con condenas previas pueden usar Carta de Liberación del KDOC, División de Libertad Condicional, Buró Federal de Prisiones (instalación en Kentucky) o Oficina de Libertad Condicional de EE.UU.—más certificado de nacimiento certificado de EE.UU. La carta debe presentarse dentro de 30 días calendario. Use la Guía IDocument en drive.ky.gov antes de visitar.
eligibility: Returning citizens with felony convictions can use a Felon Release Letter from KDOC, Division of Probation and Parole, Federal Bureau of Prisons (Kentucky facility), or U.S.
eligibility_es: Residentes de Kentucky. Ciudadanos que regresan con condenas previas pueden usar Carta de Liberación más acta de nacimiento certificada para ID estándar.
notes: Schedule appointments at any Driver Licensing Regional Office via drive.ky.gov.
notes_es: Programe citas en oficinas regionales en drive.ky.gov. Bajo supervisión, la carta debe estar notarizada y firmada por el oficial supervisor. REAL ID requiere documentación adicional.
hours: Regional office hours vary; appointments recommended—check drive.ky.gov for locations
services: Driver's licenses|State ID cards|Felon Release Letter processing|IDocument eligibility guide|Regional office appointments

name: Kentucky Driver Licensing — License Reinstatement
description: Kentucky Driver Licensing handles license reinstatement after suspensions. Standard reinstatement/re-licensing fee is $40 (pay online via myDrive, in person, by mail with certified check/money order payable to Kentucky State Treasurer, or by phone at 502-564-1257 with debit/credit). Paying the fee alone does not restore driving privileges—all suspension conditions (court orders, DUI classes, ignition interlock, etc.) must be satisfied first. If suspended more than one year, vision and written tests are required before reinstatement. Active ID card must be canceled before paying reinstatement fee.
description_es: Licencias de Kentucky maneja restablecimiento después de suspensiones. Tarifa estándar de restablecimiento: $40 (pague en línea por myDrive, en persona, por correo con cheque certificado/giro al Kentucky State Treasurer, o por teléfono al 502-564-1257). Pagar la tarifa sola no restaura privilegios—deben cumplirse todas las condiciones de suspensión. Si la suspensión supera un año, se requieren exámenes de visión y escritos. Debe cancelar identificación activa antes de pagar.
eligibility: Kentucky residents. Returning citizens with felony convictions may use a Felon Release Letter plus certified birth certificate for a standard ID—see program details.
eligibility_es: Residentes de Kentucky. Ciudadanos que regresan con condenas previas pueden usar Carta de Liberación más acta de nacimiento certificada para ID estándar.
notes: Pay by phone with debit/credit: (502) 564-1257
notes_es: Programe exámenes escritos/carretera con Kentucky State Police en kentuckystatepolice.ky.gov/driver-testing. Portal myDrive en drive.ky.gov.
hours: Reinstatement payments: online 24/7; phone and regional offices during business hours
services: Reinstatement fee payment|Suspension requirement guidance|myDrive online portal|Testing referral information|Mail and phone payment options

name: Social Security Administration — Louisville
description: Social Security Administration field office in downtown Louisville (Gene Snyder U.S. Courthouse) handles Social Security card replacement, new cards, SSN verification, and retirement/disability benefit applications. A Social Security card or number verification is required for Kentucky driver's licenses, employment, and most public benefits. As of January 2025, SSA field offices operate on an appointment-focused model—call ahead or use ssa.gov to schedule in-person service. Many services available online at ssa.gov without a visit.
description_es: Oficina de la SSA en el centro de Louisville (Tribunal Gene Snyder) maneja reemplazo de tarjeta del Seguro Social, tarjetas nuevas, verificación de SSN y solicitudes de beneficios. Se requiere tarjeta o verificación de SSN para licencias de Kentucky, empleo y la mayoría de beneficios públicos. Desde enero de 2025, las oficinas operan con citas—llame o use ssa.gov. Muchos servicios disponibles en línea sin visita.
eligibility: Kentucky residents. Returning citizens with felony convictions may use a Felon Release Letter plus certified birth certificate for a standard ID—see program details.
eligibility_es: Residentes de Kentucky. Ciudadanos que regresan con condenas previas pueden usar Carta de Liberación más acta de nacimiento certificada para ID estándar.
notes: Appointment phone: (866) 716-9671. TTY: (502) 582-5517. National line: 1-800-772-1213 (Mon–Fri 8 a.m.–7 p.m.). Entrance on 6th Street at Broadway Room 101, 1st floor.
notes_es: Teléfono de citas: (866) 716-9671. TTY: (502) 582-5517. Línea nacional: 1-800-772-1213. Entrada en 6th Street y Broadway Sala 101.
hours: Monday, Tuesday, Thursday, Friday 9:00 a.m.–4:00 p.m.; Wednesday 9:00 a.m.–12:00 p.m.
services: Social Security card replacement|SSN verification|Retirement and disability applications|Medicare enrollment assistance|Appointment scheduling

name: Social Security Administration — Lexington
description: SSA field office serving Fayette County and Central Kentucky, located off Winchester Road near the I-64/I-75 interchange. Provides Social Security card replacement, SSN verification, and benefit applications. Required for employment and obtaining Kentucky ID. Appointment recommended under SSA's appointment-focused service model effective January 2025—call local office or 1-800-772-1213. Ground-floor office; many transactions completable online at ssa.gov.
description_es: Oficina de la SSA que sirve al Condado de Fayette y centro de Kentucky, cerca de Winchester Road e intercambio I-64/I-75. Ofrece reemplazo de tarjeta del Seguro Social, verificación de SSN y solicitudes de beneficios. Cita recomendada bajo el modelo de citas de la SSA desde enero de 2025. Oficina en planta baja; muchas transacciones en línea en ssa.gov.

name: Social Security Administration — Locate an Office
description: Use SSA's national office locator to find the nearest Social Security field office anywhere in Kentucky. A Social Security number and card (or SSA verification letter) is required to obtain a Kentucky driver's license or state ID and for most employment. Call 1-800-772-1213 for automated services and appointment scheduling, or visit ssa.gov for online card replacement and benefit applications. As of 2025, in-person field office visits generally require an appointment.
description_es: Use el localizador nacional de la SSA para encontrar la oficina más cercana en Kentucky. Se necesita número y tarjeta del Seguro Social (o carta de verificación) para licencia de conducir o identificación estatal y para la mayoría del empleo. Llame al 1-800-772-1213 para servicios automatizados y citas, o visite ssa.gov. Desde 2025, las visitas en persona generalmente requieren cita.

hours: National phone line Mon–Fri 8:00 a.m.–7:00 p.m.; field office hours vary by location
services: Office location search|Appointment scheduling referral|Online service directory|SSN and card information

name: LIHEAP — Utility Assistance (Community Action Kentucky)
description: Low Income Home Energy Assistance Program (LIHEAP) helps eligible Kentucky households pay heating, cooling, and crisis utility bills. Administered through local Community Action Agencies in all 120 counties via Community Action Kentucky (CAPKY). Three components: Subsidy (seasonal, typically November–December), Crisis (heating emergencies, January–March), and Summer Subsidy (cooling, July–September). Income at or below 150% of Federal Poverty Guidelines. Apply at your county's Community Action office—call 1-800-456-3452 or use capky.org/network to find your local agency.
description_es: LIHEAP ayuda a hogares elegibles de Kentucky a pagar facturas de calefacción, refrigeración y crisis. Administrado por Agencias de Acción Comunitaria en 120 condados vía CAPKY. Tres componentes: Subsidio (noviembre–diciembre), Crisis (emergencias de calefacción, enero–marzo) y Subsidio de Verano (refrigeración, julio–septiembre). Ingresos hasta 150% de las Pautas Federales de Pobreza. Solicite en su oficina local—llame al 1-800-456-3452 o use capky.org/network.
eligibility: Low-income individuals and families; income guidelines apply for most programs. Criminal history is generally not a barrier.
eligibility_es: Personas y familias de bajos ingresos; aplican límites de ingresos en la mayoría de programas. El historial criminal generalmente no es barrera.
notes: Call to find your local Community Action office
notes_es: Componente Crisis requiere aviso de desconexión o combustible bajo. Traiga SSN de todos los miembros, comprobante de ingresos del mes anterior y facturas de servicios.
hours: Local agency hours vary; statewide info line during business hours
services: Heating and cooling bill assistance|Crisis utility intervention|Subsidy payments to utility vendors|Local agency referral|Weatherization referrals

name: Northern Kentucky Community Action Commission (NKCAC)
description: Northern Kentucky Community Action Commission (NKCAC) administers LIHEAP and other financial assistance for Boone, Campbell, Carroll, Gallatin, Grant, Kenton, Owen, and Pendleton counties. LIHEAP Subsidy provides seasonal electric/heating credits; Crisis component assists households with disconnect notices or within four days of running out of bulk fuel (January–March, walk-ins accepted within 48 hours of disconnect). Also offers Head Start, job training, adult education, and weatherization. Schedule LIHEAP appointments online at nkcac.10to8.com or call (859) 484-8450.
description_es: NKCAC administra LIHEAP y otra asistencia financiera en ocho condados del norte de Kentucky. Subsidio LIHEAP ofrece créditos estacionales; componente Crisis ayuda con avisos de desconexión o combustible a granel bajo (enero–marzo). También ofrece Head Start, capacitación laboral y climaización. Programe citas LIHEAP en nkcac.10to8.com o llame al (859) 484-8450.
eligibility: Low-income individuals and families; income guidelines apply for most programs. Criminal history is generally not a barrier.

notes_es: Centro LIHEAP Condado Kenton: 533 W. Pike Street, Covington (859) 655-2959.
hours: Monday–Friday, 8:30 a.m.–4:00 p.m. (neighborhood centers; LIHEAP by appointment)
services: LIHEAP Subsidy and Crisis|Weatherization|Head Start|Job training and adult education|Crisis financial assistance

name: kynect — KTAP & Financial Assistance
description: kynect is Kentucky's online benefits portal for applying for KTAP (Kentucky Transitional Assistance Program) cash assistance, SNAP food benefits, Medicaid, Child Care Assistance Program (CCAP), and other programs. KTAP provides monthly cash aid to low-income families with dependent children, with a 60-month lifetime limit, plus work support through Kentucky Works. Apply online at kynect.ky.gov, by phone at 855-306-8959, or in person at any DCBS office in all 120 counties. Use the prescreening tool before applying to check potential eligibility.
description_es: kynect es el portal en línea de beneficios de Kentucky para KTAP (asistencia en efectivo), SNAP, Medicaid, CCAP y otros programas. KTAP proporciona ayuda mensual a familias de bajos ingresos con hijos dependientes, con límite de 60 meses de por vida. Solicite en kynect.ky.gov, al 855-306-8959 o en cualquier oficina DCBS en 120 condados. Use la herramienta de preselección antes de solicitar.
eligibility: Low-income individuals and families; income guidelines apply for most programs. Criminal history is generally not a barrier.
eligibility_es: Personas y familias de bajos ingresos; aplican límites de ingresos en la mayoría de programas. El historial criminal generalmente no es barrera.
notes: DCBS Call Services: 855-306-8959 (Mon–Fri 8 a.m.–5 p.m. ET).
notes_es: DCBS Call Services: 855-306-8959 (lun–vie 8 a.m.–5 p.m. ET). Requiere cuenta Kentucky Online Gateway (KOG). Beneficiarios KTAP pueden calificar para cuidado infantil y transporte.
hours: Phone line Monday–Friday, 8:00 a.m.–5:00 p.m. ET; online applications 24/7
services: KTAP cash assistance applications|SNAP and Medicaid enrollment|Child Care Assistance|Kentucky Works referrals|Online benefits management

name: 211 Kentucky — Crisis Resource Navigation
description: Kentucky 211 connects residents to local emergency financial assistance, food, housing, utilities, mental health services, and other community resources. Dial 2-1-1 from any phone or text your zip code to 898211 to reach a trained specialist 24 hours a day, 7 days a week. Service provided through United Way of Kentucky's network covering all 120 counties. Free, confidential, and available in multiple languages with interpreter support. Also searchable online at kentucky211.org.
description_es: Kentucky 211 conecta a residentes con asistencia financiera de emergencia, alimentos, vivienda, servicios públicos, salud mental y otros recursos comunitarios. Marque 2-1-1 o envíe su código postal al 898211 para hablar con un especialista las 24 horas. Servicio de la red United Way de Kentucky en 120 condados. Gratuito, confidencial y con intérpretes. También busque en línea en kentucky211.org.
eligibility: Low-income individuals and families; income guidelines apply for most programs. Criminal history is generally not a barrier.
eligibility_es: Personas y familias de bajos ingresos; aplican límites de ingresos en la mayoría de programas. El historial criminal generalmente no es barrera.
notes: Text zip code to 898211 (no hyphen). 211 does not provide direct cash assistance—specialists refer to local programs. Pairs with kynect.ky.gov for benefits applications.
notes_es: Envíe código postal al 898211. 211 no proporciona efectivo directo—refiere a programas locales. Complementa kynect.ky.gov para beneficios.
hours: 24 hours a day, 7 days a week
services: Emergency resource navigation|Utility and housing referrals|Food assistance connections|Mental health resource referrals|Multi-language interpreter support

name: Bank On Louisville — Second-Chance Banking
description: Bank On Louisville is a city-led coalition connecting Louisville residents—including those with ChexSystems or prior banking problems—to certified low-cost checking accounts at mainstream banks and credit unions. Certified accounts meet national Bank On standards: no overdraft or NSF fees, $5 or less monthly, free deposits/withdrawals/bill pay. Participating institutions include Bank of America, Chase, Fifth Third, PNC, U.S. Bank, Park Community Credit Union, and others. Also offers financial education and connects to the Louisville Financial Empowerment Center for free one-on-one counseling.
description_es: Bank On Louisville es una coalición municipal que conecta a residentes de Louisville—incluso con historial en ChexSystems—a cuentas corrientes certificadas de bajo costo. Cuentas certificadas: sin cargos por sobregiro, $5 o menos al mes, depósitos/retiros/pagos gratis. Instituciones participantes incluyen Bank of America, Chase, Fifth Third, PNC, U.S. Bank y Park Community Credit Union. También ofrece educación financiera y el Centro de Empoderamiento Financiero.
eligibility: Low-income individuals and families; income guidelines apply for most programs. Criminal history is generally not a barrier.
eligibility_es: Personas y familias de bajos ingresos; aplican límites de ingresos en la mayoría de programas. El historial criminal generalmente no es barrera.
notes: Led by Louisville Metro Office of Resilience and Community Services. Visit bankonlouisville.org for current certified account list.
notes_es: Dirigido por la Oficina de Resiliencia y Servicios Comunitarios de Louisville. Visite bankonlouisville.org para lista de cuentas certificadas. Centro de Empoderamiento Financiero: asesoría gratuita.
hours: Online resources 24/7; coalition office Mon–Fri business hours
services: Certified low-fee checking account referrals|Financial education workshops|Financial Empowerment Center counseling|ChexSystems-friendly banking connections

name: Commonwealth Credit Union — 20/20 Checking
description: Commonwealth Credit Union offers 20/20 Checking—a second-chance account for members rebuilding after negative banking history. No minimum balance; $10 monthly fee; free Visa debit card with mobile wallet access; digital banking included. After one year of responsible use, members may transition to a standard commonWEALTH Checking account. Serves Central Kentucky with 17 branch locations. Membership open to those who live, work, worship, or attend school in eligible Kentucky counties.
description_es: Commonwealth Credit Union ofrece 20/20 Checking—cuenta de segunda oportunidad para miembros que reconstruyen después de historial bancario negativo. Sin saldo mínimo; $10 mensuales; tarjeta Visa débito gratis; banca digital incluida. Después de un año de uso responsable, puede pasar a commonWEALTH Checking. Sirve al centro de Kentucky con 17 sucursales.
eligibility: Low-income individuals and families; income guidelines apply for most programs. Criminal history is generally not a barrier.

name: Transit Authority of River City (TARC) — Louisville
description: Transit Authority of River City (TARC) operates public bus service throughout Louisville and Jefferson County with 24+ fixed routes and 3,400+ stops—primary transit for people without vehicles. Adult fare $2.25 per ride (effective March 2026); reduced fares $1.00 for seniors, students, and eligible riders. Passes: 24-hour ($5), 7-day ($25), 30-day ($75). Pay with MyTARC card, Token Transit app, or exact cash. TARC3 paratransit available for eligible riders with disabilities. Customer service at 1000 W. Broadway.
description_es: TARC opera autobuses públicos en Louisville y el Condado de Jefferson con más de 24 rutas y 3,400 paradas—transporte principal para personas sin vehículo. Tarifa adulto $2.25 por viaje; tarifa reducida $1.00. Pases: 24 horas ($5), 7 días ($25), 30 días ($75). Pague con tarjeta MyTARC, app Token Transit o efectivo exacto. TARC3 paratransit para personas elegibles con discapacidades.
eligibility: Open to the public; reduced fares may require eligibility documentation (age, disability, or income).

notes: MyTARC card kiosk: 1000 W. Broadway, Mon–Fri 8 a.m.–4:30 p.m. Real-time schedules at ridetarc.org or Transit app. Network redesign launching August 2026.

name: Lextran — Lexington Public Transit
description: Lextran is Lexington and Fayette County's public bus system operating 26 fixed routes 7 days a week, 365 days a year. Standard fare $1.00 per trip; half fares ($0.50) for seniors 62+ and people with disabilities with Lextran ID card. Service spans 5:00 a.m.–12:30 a.m. weekdays/Saturdays and 5:00 a.m.–9:30 p.m. Sundays. Downtown Transit Center at 150 E. Vine Street is the route hub. Lextran Wheels paratransit serves riders who cannot use fixed routes.

Tarifa estándar $1.00 por viaje; media tarifa ($0.50) para mayores de 62 años y personas con discapacidad con tarjeta Lextran. Servicio de 5:00 a.m. a 12:30 a.m. entre semana/sábados. Centro de Tránsito en 150 E. Vine Street. Lextran Wheels paratransit para quienes no pueden usar rutas fijas.

name: TANK — Transit Authority of Northern Kentucky
description: Transit Authority of Northern Kentucky (TANK) provides public bus service in Boone, Campbell, and Kenton counties with connections to downtown Cincinnati. Operates 27 routes, 19 park-and-ride locations, and the RAMP paratransit program for riders with disabilities, 365 days a year. Covington Transit Center on Madison Avenue is a major hub. Essential transportation for NKY residents without vehicles traveling to work, appointments, and Cincinnati-area destinations.
description_es: TANK proporciona autobuses públicos en los condados Boone, Campbell y Kenton con conexiones al centro de Cincinnati. Opera 27 rutas, 19 park-and-ride y paratransit RAMP para personas con discapacidades, 365 días al año. Centro de Tránsito de Covington en Madison Avenue es un hub principal. Transporte esencial para residentes de NKY sin vehículo.
eligibility: Open to the public; reduced fares may require eligibility documentation (age, disability, or income).
