name: Kentucky Child Support Services — Attorney General
description: Kentucky's child support program is administered by the Office of the Attorney General as the Department of Child Support Services (DCSS), effective July 1, 2025 (previously under CHFS). Handles establishment of paternity and support orders, modification, enforcement, wage withholding, and payment tracking for cases statewide. Custodial and non-custodial parents can apply online, make payments, and manage cases through kentuckychildsupport.ky.gov. Hotline for case assistance; 24/7 automated payment info at 800-443-1576.
description_es: El programa de manutención de menores de Kentucky es administrado por la Fiscalía General como DCSS, desde el 1 de julio de 2025. Maneja paternidad, órdenes de manutención, modificación, ejecución, retención salarial y seguimiento de pagos. Padres custodios y no custodios pueden solicitar, pagar y gestionar casos en kentuckychildsupport.ky.gov. Línea de ayuda; información automatizada 24/7 al 800-443-1576.
eligibility: Varies by program—open to parents, caregivers, and families affected by incarceration.
eligibility_es: Varía según el programa—abierto a padres, cuidadores y familias afectadas por encarcelamiento.
notes: Hotline: (800) 248-1163 (Mon–Fri 8 a.m.–4:30 p.m. ET). IVR 24/7: (800) 443-1576. Mail payments: P.O. Box 14059, Lexington, KY 40512-4059. K-TAP recipients receive services automatically.
notes_es: Línea: (800) 248-1163 (lun–vie 8 a.m.–4:30 p.m. ET). IVR 24/7: (800) 443-1576. Pagos por correo: P.O. Box 14059, Lexington, KY 40512-4059.
hours: Hotline Monday–Friday, 8:00 a.m.–4:30 p.m. ET; online portal 24/7
services: Child support order establishment|Paternity establishment|Payment processing and tracking|Wage withholding enforcement|Online case management portal

name: Louisville Metro Child Support Division
description: Jefferson County Attorney's Office Child Support Division—Kentucky's largest county child support office with nearly 55,000 active cases—provides local enforcement for Jefferson County residents under contract with the state DCSS (Attorney General). Services include locating non-custodial parents, establishing and modifying orders, medical support, payment monitoring, and enforcement. Apply in person, online at kentuckychildsupport.ky.gov, or by phone. Cash payments accepted at Bishop Lane office and Hall of Justice downtown.
description_es: División de Manutención de Menores del Fiscal del Condado de Jefferson—la oficina más grande de Kentucky—proporciona ejecución local para residentes del condado bajo contrato con DCSS estatal. Servicios incluyen localización de padres no custodios, establecimiento y modificación de órdenes, apoyo médico y monitoreo de pagos. Solicite en persona, en kentuckychildsupport.ky.gov o por teléfono.
eligibility: Varies by program—open to parents, caregivers, and families affected by incarceration.
eligibility_es: Varía según el programa—abierto a padres, cuidadores y familias afectadas por encarcelamiento.
notes: Payment window: Mon–Fri 8:00 a.m.–4:45 p.m. at 1930 Bishop Lane and Hall of Justice (600 W. Jefferson St, 1st floor). After-hours drop box at both locations. State hotline: (800) 248-1163.
notes_es: Ventanilla de pagos: lun–vie 8:00 a.m.–4:45 p.m. en 1930 Bishop Lane y Hall of Justice (600 W. Jefferson St). Buzón después de horas en ambos lugares.
hours: Monday–Friday, 8:00 a.m.–5:00 p.m. (phones 8:30 a.m.–4:30 p.m.; payment window until 4:45 p.m.)
services: Local child support enforcement|Paternity and order establishment|Payment collection and monitoring|Non-custodial parent location|Medical support orders

name: KVC Kentucky — Family Reunification Services
description: KVC Kentucky is a nonprofit child welfare and behavioral health organization headquartered in Lexington, serving more than 22,000 children and families annually across eight Kentucky regions. Family First Preservation and Reunification Services help families stay together or reunify after out-of-home placement through in-home, evidence-based support coordinated with DCBS. Also provides behavioral health, substance abuse treatment, and foster care services. All preservation/reunification referrals come through the Department for Community Based Services (DCBS)—contact your DCBS worker to initiate.
description_es: KVC Kentucky es una organización sin fines de lucro de bienestar infantil y salud conductual con sede en Lexington, que sirve a más de 22,000 niños y familias anualmente en ocho regiones. Servicios de Preservación y Reunificación Familiar ayudan a familias a permanecer juntas o reunificarse después de separación, coordinados con DCBS. También ofrece salud conductual, tratamiento de sustancias y cuidado de crianza. Referidos de preservación/reunificación vienen de DCBS.
eligibility: Varies by program—open to parents, caregivers, and families affected by incarceration.
eligibility_es: Varía según el programa—abierto a padres, cuidadores y familias afectadas por encarcelamiento.
notes_es: Se requiere referido de DCBS para servicios Family First—no puede auto-referirse. Para admisión de salud conductual, contacte KVC al (859) 254-1035.
hours: Monday–Friday during business hours; behavioral health intake by appointment
services: Family preservation services|Family reunification support|In-home behavioral health|Substance abuse treatment|Foster care (separate program)

name: Center for Women and Families — Louisville
description: The Center for Women and Families provides 24/7 trauma-informed advocacy, crisis response, emergency shelter, and support for survivors of intimate partner violence and sexual assault across nine Kentuckiana counties (Jefferson, Bullitt, Henry, Oldham, Shelby, Spencer, Trimble in KY; Clark and Floyd in IN). Highly relevant for women leaving incarceration with domestic violence history. Louisville campus at 927 S. 2nd Street open 24 hours with emergency shelter. Toll-free crisis line available statewide.
description_es: The Center for Women and Families ofrece defensa informada sobre trauma 24/7, respuesta a crisis, refugio de emergencia y apoyo a sobrevivientes de violencia de pareja y agresión sexual en nueve condados de Kentuckiana. Muy relevante para mujeres que salen del encarcelamiento con historial de violencia doméstica. Campus de Louisville en 927 S. 2nd Street abierto 24 horas con refugio de emergencia.
eligibility: Varies by program—open to parents, caregivers, and families affected by incarceration.
eligibility_es: Varía según el programa—abierto a padres, cuidadores y familias afectadas por encarcelamiento.
notes: Toll-free 24/7 crisis line: 1-844-237-2331. Louisville local crisis line: (502) 581-7222. Walk-in advocacy Mon–Fri 9 a.m.–5 p.m. at 927 S. 2nd St.
notes_es: Línea de crisis 24/7 gratuita: 1-844-237-2331. Línea local Louisville: (502) 581-7222. Atención sin cita lun–vie 9 a.m.–5 p.m. Intérpretes disponibles.
hours: 24/7 crisis line and Louisville campus; walk-in advocacy Mon–Fri 9:00 a.m.–5:00 p.m.
services: 24/7 crisis hotline|Emergency shelter|Sexual assault forensic exams|Safety planning|Legal and housing advocacy|Children's services

name: Reflections of Hope
description: Reflections of Hope provides Adult Peer Support Specialist (APSS) certification training dual-certified for both Kentucky and Ohio—one training yielding credentials in both states. Also offers Community Support Associate (CSA) training for Kentucky. Programs prepare individuals with lived experience in mental health or substance use recovery for peer support careers inside and outside the justice system, supporting reentry and recidivism reduction. Kentucky APSS requires 30+ hours of state-approved training, written and oral exams, and registration through DBHDID TRIS.
description_es: Reflections of Hope ofrece capacitación de Especialista en Apoyo entre Pares para Adultos (APSS) con certificación dual para Kentucky y Ohio—una capacitación, dos credenciales. También ofrece capacitación CSA para Kentucky. Prepara personas con experiencia vivida en salud mental o recuperación de sustancias para carreras de apoyo entre pares dentro y fuera del sistema judicial, apoyando la reinserción.
eligibility: Open to adults in recovery or seeking peer support, including those recently released from incarceration.
eligibility_es: Abierto a adultos en recuperación o que buscan apoyo entre pares, incluidos recién liberados.
notes: KY requirements: 18+, high school diploma/GED, documented mental health or substance use diagnosis with pattern of recovery. Upload CEUs to tris.dbhdid.ky.gov. Online 40-hour dual KY/OH certification available.
notes_es: Requisitos KY: 18+, diploma/GED, diagnóstico documentado de salud mental o sustancias con patrón de recuperación. Suba CEUs a tris.dbhdid.ky.gov. Certificación dual en línea de 40 horas disponible.
hours: Training schedules vary; online and in-person cohorts—check reflecthope.org
services: Adult Peer Support Specialist dual KY/OH certification|Community Support Associate training|Online certification courses|CEU upload guidance|Reentry peer workforce preparation

name: EKCEP — Peer Recovery Coaches (Eastern KY)
description: Eastern Kentucky Concentrated Employment Program (EKCEP) Recovery & Reentry division serves 23 Appalachian coalfield counties through the Strategic Initiative for Transformational Employment (SITE). Job Entry and Retention Support Specialists (JERSS) connect justice-involved individuals and people in recovery with career advising, barrier relief (IDs, transportation, certifications), peer support training funding, and second-chance employer placement. EKCEP is a WIOA-funded American Job Center partner headquartered in Hazard.
description_es: EKCEP Recovery & Reentry sirve 23 condados apalaches a través del SITE. Especialistas JERSS conectan a personas en recuperación e involucradas con la justicia con orientación profesional, alivio de barreras (identificaciones, transporte, certificaciones), financiamiento de capacitación en apoyo entre pares y colocación con empleadores de segunda oportunidad. Socio de American Job Center con sede en Hazard.
eligibility: Open to adults in recovery or seeking peer support, including those recently released from incarceration.
eligibility_es: Abierto a adultos en recuperación o que buscan apoyo entre pares, incluidos recién liberados.
notes: Connect with a JERSS at ekcep.org/recovery. Also operates Kentucky Career Center in Pikeville (id 502). Counties include Perry, Pike, Floyd, Letcher, Knott, and 18 others.
notes_es: Conecte con un JERSS en ekcep.org/recovery. Condados incluyen Perry, Pike, Floyd, Letcher, Knott y 18 más.
hours: Monday–Friday during business hours; contact for appointment
services: Recovery-informed career advising|Barrier relief assistance|Peer support certification funding|Second-chance job placement|American Job Center services

name: Baptist Fellowship Center — Reentry Mentor Program
description: Baptist Fellowship Center is a faith-based community ministry in west Louisville offering youth mentoring (S.O.Y. Save Our Youth program), family support, employment readiness, and life-skills training for individuals and families seeking stability after incarceration or justice involvement. Provides mentoring, budgeting help, and connections to community partners—not a state-contracted reentry facility, but a grassroots support hub open to returning citizens.
description_es: Baptist Fellowship Center es un ministerio comunitario de base religiosa en el oeste de Louisville que ofrece mentoría juvenil (programa S.O.Y.), apoyo familiar, preparación laboral y capacitación en habilidades de vida para personas que buscan estabilidad después del encarcelamiento. Proporciona mentoría, ayuda con presupuesto y conexiones comunitarias.
eligibility: Open to adults in recovery or seeking peer support, including those recently released from incarceration.
eligibility_es: Abierto a adultos en recuperación o que buscan apoyo entre pares, incluidos recién liberados.
notes: S.O.Y. male mentoring for ages 10–17. Family support includes counseling, parenting skills, and financial management. Call or use online contact form to inquire about adult reentry support.
notes_es: Mentoría S.O.Y. para jóvenes de 10–17 años. Apoyo familiar incluye consejería y habilidades financieras. Llame para consultar apoyo de reinserción para adultos.
hours: Monday–Friday during business hours; call for appointment
services: Youth mentoring (S.O.Y.)|Family support and counseling|Employment readiness training|Community resource connections|Life skills development

name: NA / Narcotics Anonymous — Kentucky
description: Narcotics Anonymous Kentucky offers free peer-led recovery meetings for people seeking freedom from addiction. Meetings available in all Kentucky regions—in-person, online, and hybrid—with no dues, fees, or membership requirements. Use the meeting finder to locate the nearest group by city or zip code. Welcoming to people leaving incarceration, treatment, or active use.
description_es: Narcotics Anonymous Kentucky ofrece reuniones gratuitas de recuperación lideradas por pares para personas que buscan libertad de la adicción. Reuniones en todas las regiones de Kentucky—en persona, en línea e híbridas—sin cuotas ni requisitos de membresía. Use el buscador de reuniones por ciudad o código postal.
eligibility: Open to adults in recovery or seeking peer support, including those recently released from incarceration.
eligibility_es: Abierto a adultos en recuperación o que buscan apoyo entre pares, incluidos recién liberados.
notes: Meeting finder: naky.org/find-a-meeting
notes_es: NA no está afiliado a ninguna otra organización. Formatos de reuniones varían. Reuniones virtuales en naky.org. No se requiere referido.
hours: Meeting times vary by group; many groups meet daily—check meeting finder
services: In-person NA meetings|Online and hybrid meetings|Meeting locator by county|Peer-led recovery support|No-cost participation

name: AA / Alcoholics Anonymous — Kentucky
description: Alcoholics Anonymous Kentucky provides free peer support meetings for people recovering from alcohol use disorder. Meetings held statewide in cities and rural communities, with many online options. No dues, fees, or professional counselors—members share experience, strength, and hope. Open to anyone with a desire to stop drinking, including people reentering from incarceration.
description_es: Alcoholics Anonymous Kentucky proporciona reuniones gratuitas de apoyo entre pares para personas en recuperación del trastorno por uso de alcohol. Reuniones en todo el estado con muchas opciones en línea. Sin cuotas ni consejeros profesionales. Abierto a cualquier persona que desee dejar de beber.
eligibility: Open to adults in recovery or seeking peer support, including those recently released from incarceration.
eligibility_es: Abierto a adultos en recuperación o que buscan apoyo entre pares, incluidos recién liberados.
notes: Find local meetings at aa-ky.org or call your area's AA hotline. Open meetings welcome anyone
notes_es: Encuentre reuniones locales en aa-ky.org. Reuniones abiertas dan la bienvenida a todos cerradas para quienes tienen un problema de alcohol.
hours: Meeting schedules vary; many groups meet daily—check aa-ky.org
services: In-person AA meetings|Online meeting options|Area meeting directories|Peer-led sobriety support|Sponsorship connections

name: KCTCS — Adult Education & GED (Statewide)
description: Kentucky Community and Technical College System (KCTCS) administers free adult education and GED preparation statewide through 13 college-based Kentucky Adult Education (KYAE) providers in all 120 counties. Classes offered in communities, jails, and prisons. Kentucky pays for first GED test in each subject (plus limited retakes) for eligible test-takers who pass the free GED Ready practice test—use promo code KYFREEGED1. Over 4,460 GEDs awarded to incarcerated Kentuckians 2020–2024.
description_es: KCTCS administra educación para adultos y preparación GED gratuita en 120 condados a través de 13 proveedores KYAE. Clases en comunidades, cárceles y prisiones. Kentucky paga la primera prueba GED en cada materia para elegibles que pasen GED Ready—código KYFREEGED1. Más de 4,460 GEDs otorgados a personas encarceladas 2020–2024.
eligibility: Kentucky residents age 18 or older. All adult education and GED services are free through KYAE.
eligibility_es: Residentes de Kentucky de 18 años o más. Todos los servicios de educación para adultos y GED son gratuitos a través de KYAE.
notes: Contact your local KCTCS college to find the nearest program
notes_es: Encuentre su centro en kyae.ky.gov. Edad mínima 19 sin exención. También ofrece ESL, certificaciones laborales y alfabetización familiar.
hours: Local center hours vary by KCTCS college—contact nearest provider
services: Free GED preparation classes|Corrections education in jails and prisons|GED Ready practice testing|Free first-time GED testing|ESL and workforce certifications

name: Bluegrass Community & Technical College — Adult Education
description: Bluegrass Community & Technical College (BCTC) Adult Education provides free GED preparation for adults in Central Kentucky—Fayette, Bourbon, Clark, Harrison, Jessamine, Mercer, Scott, and Woodford counties. In-person and online class options. Part of the statewide KYAE/KCTCS network with free GED Ready testing and state-funded first-time GED exam fees for eligible students.
description_es: Educación para Adultos de BCTC ofrece preparación GED gratuita en el centro de Kentucky—8 condados incluido Fayette. Opciones en persona y en línea. Parte de la red KYAE/KCTCS con GED Ready gratuito y exámenes GED financiados por el estado para elegibles.
eligibility: Part of the statewide KYAE/KCTCS network with free GED Ready testing and state-funded first-time GED exam fees for eligible students.

name: Gateway Community & Technical College — Adult Education
description: Gateway Community & Technical College Adult Education offers free GED preparation in Northern Kentucky for Boone, Kenton, Campbell, Grant, Owen, and surrounding counties. Kentucky waives GED testing fees for first-time test takers working through a KYAE center. Classes at Florence campus and community sites. Gateway also recognizes GED College Ready scores for college enrollment.
description_es: Educación para Adultos de Gateway ofrece preparación GED gratuita en el norte de Kentucky para Boone, Kenton, Campbell, Grant, Owen y condados circundantes. Kentucky exonera tarifas GED para primeros solicitantes a través de un centro KYAE. Clases en Florence y sitios comunitarios.
eligibility: Kentucky residents age 18 or older. All adult education and GED services are free through KYAE.
eligibility_es: Residentes de Kentucky de 18 años o más. Todos los servicios de educación para adultos y GED son gratuitos a través de KYAE.
notes: GED fee waiver available when working with local Gateway/KYAE office.

hours: Monday–Friday during business hours
services: Free GED preparation|Testing fee waiver assistance|GED Ready practice tests|College enrollment pathway|Workforce skills training

name: South Central KY CTC (SKYCTC) — Adult Education
description: Southcentral Kentucky Community & Technical College (SKYCTC) Adult Education provides free GED classes for Warren, Barren, Simpson, and Metcalfe counties. Part of the KCTCS/KYAE statewide network with corrections education offerings. Kentucky covers first GED test fees for eligible students completing GED Ready through a local center.
description_es: Educación para Adultos de SKYCTC ofrece clases GED gratuitas para los condados Warren, Barren, Simpson y Metcalfe. Parte de la red KCTCS/KYAE con educación correccional. Kentucky cubre las primeras tarifas GED para elegibles.
eligibility: Kentucky residents age 18 or older. All adult education and GED services are free through KYAE.

hours: Monday–Friday during business hours
services: Free GED preparation|Skills assessment and intake|GED testing coordination|Workforce certification pathways|Corrections education

name: Kentucky Adult Education — Find a Program
description: Kentucky Adult Education (KYAE) is the state office connecting residents to free adult education in all 120 counties—GED preparation, literacy, ESL, workforce certifications, and family literacy. Use the online locator to find your county's KCTCS-based adult education center. All GED seekers must pass the GED Ready practice test (free at KYAE centers) before qualifying for state-funded GED testing.
description_es: Kentucky Adult Education (KYAE) conecta a residentes con educación para adultos gratuita en 120 condados—GED, alfabetización, ESL, certificaciones laborales y alfabetización familiar. Use el localizador en línea para encontrar su centro. Todos deben pasar GED Ready (gratis en centros KYAE) antes de calificar para pruebas financiadas.
eligibility: Kentucky residents age 18 or older. All adult education and GED services are free through KYAE.
eligibility_es: Residentes de Kentucky de 18 años o más. Todos los servicios de educación para adultos y GED son gratuitos a través de KYAE.
notes: Promo codes: KYFREEGED1 (test center) or OPKYFREEGED (online proctored).
notes_es: Códigos promocionales: KYFREEGED1 (centro) u OPKYFREEGED (en línea). Inscripción no requerida pero recomendada para apoyo académico.
hours: Varies by county center—use locator for local contact
services: County program locator|GED pathway information|ESL and literacy referrals|Workforce certification programs|Free GED Ready testing info

name: Robley Rex VA Medical Center — Louisville
description: Robley Rex VA Medical Center is a full-service VA hospital serving Louisville-area veterans 24/7. Offers primary care, mental health, substance use treatment, specialty care, and homeless veteran services. Justice-involved veterans can access Veterans Justice Outreach (VJO) coordinators embedded in mental health who work with courts, jails, and probation. Toll-free: 800-376-8387.
description_es: Robley Rex VA Medical Center es un hospital del VA de servicio completo para veteranos del área de Louisville las 24 horas. Ofrece atención primaria, salud mental, tratamiento de sustancias y servicios para veteranos sin hogar. Veteranos en el sistema de justicia acceden a coordinadores VJO en salud mental. Toll-free: 800-376-8387.
eligibility: Justice-involved veterans can access Veterans Justice Outreach (VJO) coordinators embedded in mental health who work with courts, jails, and probation.
eligibility_es: Veteranos militares de EE.UU. y familiares elegibles. Algunos programas atienden veteranos con participación en justicia penal.
notes: Enroll in VA health care at va.gov/health-care/apply. Emergency: 911 or visit ER 24/7.
notes_es: Inscríbase en atención VA en va.gov/health-care/apply. VJO: pida Salud Mental/VJO al llamar. Emergencia: 911 o ER 24/7.
hours: Open 24 hours, 7 days a week
services: Primary and specialty medical care|Mental health and SUD treatment|Veterans Justice Outreach|Homeless veteran care coordination|Emergency services

name: Louisville VA — Veterans Justice Outreach (VJO)
description: Louisville VA Veterans Justice Outreach (VJO) places four coordinators at Robley Rex VA who work directly with courts, jails, and probation/parole to identify and engage justice-involved veterans. VJO helps veterans access VA mental health, substance use treatment, housing, and benefits as an alternative to incarceration when appropriate. Ask for Mental Health/VJO when calling the medical center.
description_es: VJO del VA de Louisville coloca cuatro coordinadores en Robley Rex que trabajan con tribunales, cárceles y libertad condicional para identificar veteranos en el sistema de justicia. VJO ayuda a acceder a salud mental, tratamiento de sustancias, vivienda y beneficios del VA. Pida Salud Mental/VJO al llamar.
eligibility: Louisville VA Veterans Justice Outreach (VJO) places four coordinators at Robley Rex VA who work directly with courts, jails, and probation/parole to identify and engage justice-involved veterans.
eligibility_es: Veteranos militares de EE.UU. y familiares elegibles. Algunos programas atienden veteranos con participación en justicia penal.
notes: VJO emails: sonny.hatfield@va.gov | scott.huisman@va.gov | dawne.james@va.gov | Keather.Likins@va.gov
notes_es: Especialistas VJO: Sonny Hatfield, Scott Huisman, Dawne James, Keather Likins. Línea de crisis: 988 presione 1.

name: Lexington VA Medical Center
description: Lexington VA Health Care System serves Central and Eastern Kentucky veterans across Leestown and Sousley campuses. Full-service medical center with mental health, substance use treatment, primary care, and specialty services. Justice-involved veterans can connect with VJO coordinators and homeless veteran care teams for reentry support from jails and courts in the region.

Centro médico completo con salud mental, tratamiento de sustancias y atención primaria. Veteranos en el sistema de justicia pueden conectarse con coordinadores VJO y equipos de veteranos sin hogar.
eligibility: U.S. military veterans and eligible family members. Some programs serve veterans with justice involvement.
eligibility_es: Veteranos militares de EE.UU. y familiares elegibles. Algunos programas atienden veteranos con participación en justicia penal.
notes: Main campus: 1101 Veterans Drive (Leestown). Enroll at va.gov/health-care/apply. Sousley campus offers additional outpatient services.
notes_es: Campus principal: 1101 Veterans Drive (Leestown). Inscríbase en va.gov/health-care/apply.
hours: Varies by clinic; emergency services available—call for hours

name: Lexington VA — Veterans Justice Outreach (VJO)
description: Lexington VA Veterans Justice Outreach connects justice-involved veterans in Central and Eastern Kentucky to VA mental health, substance use, housing, and benefits through court and jail partnerships. VJO coordinators Kathy Vasquez and Janis Skilling serve Fayette County and surrounding regions including satellite Vet Center locations in Corbin, Lawrenceburg, London, Mt. Sterling, and Richmond.
description_es: VJO del VA de Lexington conecta a veteranos en el sistema de justicia en el centro y este de Kentucky con salud mental, sustancias, vivienda y beneficios del VA. Coordinadoras Kathy Vasquez y Janis Skilling sirven Fayette y regiones circundantes incluyendo Centros Vet satélite.
eligibility: U.S. military veterans and eligible family members. Some programs serve veterans with justice involvement.

notes_es: Correos VJO: kathy.vasquez2@va.gov, janis.skilling@va.gov. Línea nacional veteranos sin hogar: 877-424-3838.

services: Court and jail veteran identification|VA treatment enrollment assistance|Housing and benefits navigation|Specialty court coordination|Regional satellite outreach

name: National Call Center for Homeless Veterans
description: National Call Center for Homeless Veterans (877-4AID-VET) is a free, confidential 24/7 hotline connecting veterans— including those leaving incarceration without housing—to the nearest VA homeless program, emergency shelter, and case management. Critical first contact for veterans with no place to stay after release. Trained counselors assess needs and link to HUD-VASH, SSVF, and other VA housing resources.
description_es: Línea nacional para veteranos sin hogar (877-4AID-VET) es una línea gratuita y confidencial 24/7 que conecta a veteranos—incluidos los que salen del encarcelamiento sin vivienda—con el programa de vivienda del VA más cercano, refugio de emergencia y gestión de casos.
eligibility: U.S. military veterans and eligible family members. Some programs serve veterans with justice involvement.
eligibility_es: Veteranos militares de EE.UU. y familiares elegibles. Algunos programas atienden veteranos con participación en justicia penal.
notes: Also chat at va.gov/homeless/nationalcallcenter.asp. Have DD-214 and SSN ready if available. Works with local VA Medical Center homeless teams.
notes_es: También chat en va.gov/homeless. Tenga DD-214 y SSN listos si están disponibles.
hours: 24 hours a day, 7 days a week
services: 24/7 homeless veteran triage|VA housing program referrals|Emergency shelter connections|Case management linkage|HUD-VASH and SSVF intake routing

name: Veterans Crisis Line
description: Veterans Crisis Line provides free, confidential crisis support for veterans and their families 24/7. Call or text 988 then press 1, or chat at veteranscrisisline.net. Trained responders—many veterans themselves—provide immediate support for suicidal crisis, PTSD episodes, and reentry stress. Also supports active duty, Guard, Reserve, and family members.
description_es: Línea de Crisis para Veteranos ofrece apoyo gratuito y confidencial 24/7. Llame o envíe mensaje al 988 y presione 1, o chat en veteranscrisisline.net. Respondedores capacitados brindan apoyo inmediato en crisis suicida, TEPT y estrés de reinserción.
eligibility: U.S. military veterans and eligible family members. Some programs serve veterans with justice involvement.
eligibility_es: Veteranos militares de EE.UU. y familiares elegibles. Algunos programas atienden veteranos con participación en justicia penal.
notes: Text 838255 to connect. If immediate danger, call 911. Spanish-language support available.

Services include PTSD treatment, military sexual trauma (MST) support, readjustment counseling, bereavement, and reentry navigation. No cost regardless of discharge status for combat veterans. Same 877 number provides 24/7 crisis support.

Servicios incluyen tratamiento de TEPT, apoyo MST, consejería de reajuste y navegación de reinserción. Sin costo para veteranos de combate. Mismo número 877 brinda apoyo de crisis 24/7.

Services include PTSD treatment, MST support, marriage and family counseling, and employment transition help.

Chapter 31 VR&E helps veterans with service-connected disabilities prepare for, find, and keep employment—including justice-involved veterans rebuilding careers after incarceration.

Capítulo 31 VR&E ayuda a veteranos con discapacidades relacionadas con el servicio a prepararse y mantener empleo.

Entry point is through the VA Medical Center homeless team—call Robley Rex at (502) 287-4000 or the National Call Center at 877-424-3838. Louisville Metro Housing Authority administers local vouchers. VOA Mid-States provides SSVF (Supportive Services for Veteran Families) across Kentucky.

Punto de entrada: equipo de veteranos sin hogar del VA—Robley Rex (502) 287-4000 o 877-424-3838. Louisville Metro Housing Authority administra vales locales. VOA Mid-States ofrece SSVF.
eligibility: U.S. military veterans and eligible family members. Some programs serve veterans with justice involvement.
eligibility_es: Veteranos militares de EE.UU. y familiares elegibles. Algunos programas atienden veteranos con participación en justicia penal.

services: HUD rental voucher referral|VA case management|SSVF rapid rehousing|Homeless veteran intake|Housing search assistance

description: Kentucky Department of Veterans Affairs (KDVA) is the state agency supporting Kentucky's 290,000+ veterans with 20 federally accredited Veteran Service Officers (VSOs) in regional offices. Programs include Veterans High School Diploma, Homeless Veterans Program, Women Veterans Program, and free benefits claims assistance. VSOs help file VA disability, pension, and education claims at no charge.

Programas incluyen Diploma de Escuela Secundaria para Veteranos, Programa para Veteranos sin Hogar, Mujeres Veteranas y asistencia gratuita con reclamaciones de beneficios.

name: Center for Employment Opportunities (CEO) — Louisville
description: Center for Employment Opportunities (CEO) Louisville exclusively serves people recently released from incarceration who are on probation or parole. One-week job-readiness orientation leads to paid transitional work crews (daily pay), then job coaching, employer outreach, and up to one year of retention support after full-time placement. Referral through parole/probation officer required. Opened August 2019 in partnership with KY DOC and KYTC.

Orientación de una semana conduce a trabajos de transición pagados (pago diario), luego coaching laboral y hasta un año de apoyo después de la colocación. Se requiere referido del oficial de libertad condicional/vigilada.
